prompt: Create a visual representation of a depth map. Use the geometric structure from image 3 as the scene environment. Place the sheep character from image 2 within this environment. Represent depth using a grayscale map, augmented with the simple graphical style of image 1 elements for labels.
prompt_refined: Generate a grayscale depth map image. The scene environment should utilize the complex three-dimensional geometric structure and tessellation pattern from image 3. Place the distinct, simple cartoon-like sheep character from image 2 within this environment, positioned prominently to demonstrate depth variations. Represent depth using a grayscale gradient where closer objects are brighter (lighter gray/white) and further objects are darker (darker gray/black). Integrate textual labels for depth values or regions, rendered in the unique pixelated, blocky font style observed in image 1.
objects: Environment with complex three-dimensional geometric structure
Prominent positioning of the sheep character to demonstrate depth
Textual labels for depth values or regions
Pixelated, blocky font style for the textual labels
